description: Legal fragment in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Mentions Tinnīs. Mentions: the speaker wishing to will his or her money away; an amount owed to the speaker by Abū l-Munā b. Abū Naṣr; a price of 36 dinars; the speaker going down to Tinnīs (to collect the money?); not wishing to involve a young man in the affair; summoning R. Ṭoviyya al-Kohen and 3 Jews (as a court). NB: This transcription is currently paired with the incorrect image/description
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
